chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. S – 126 of 2021 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case For hearing of main case 28-06-2021 Mr. Sohail Ahmed Khoso, Advocate for petitioner. Mr. Shahryar Imdad Awan, Assistant Advocate General Sindh..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Learned counsel for the petitioner states that purpose of filing the present petition has been served and he does not press the same. Accordingly, instant petition is dismissed as withdrawn. J U D G E Abdul Basit
